stemHtml: After reporting "CLIPPER 347, FINAL", which transmission would you expect next?

options.a: AIRPLANE CALLING, RUNWAY 27 CLEARED TO LAND, WIND 260 DEGREES AT 12 KNOTS.
options.c: CLIPPER, CLEARED TO LAND, WIND CALM.
options.d: CLIPPER 347, RUNWAY 27 CLEARED TO LAND, WIND 290 DEGREES AT 10 KNOTS.
